method: task-level bootstrap (seed 16, 10k) on the fp-7 re-valued ratio; ext-FPR correction discounts success counts per-stratum AND re-derives the valuing posterior
flags: ext fail-rates measured at 3B, modeled at 1.5B
gen minutes are governed wall-clock (fp-11 pending)
prereg_verdict_rule: corrected CI excludes 1.0 -> edge real; includes 1.0 -> cost parity, upvalued-band filter is the surviving rationale
